extension.summary: Create MusicIP mixes from the current song or from a song selected in the music library.
extension.description: Uses a local MusicIP server to generate mixes from the full path of the currently playing song or from a song selected through the music library context menu. Shows the result as a music folder, caches the last result per seed and size, exposes previously generated mixes later in the plugin, supports controlled refresh from the context menu, includes the seed song as the first track without duplication, preserves the generated mix order, and lets you remove tracks from the stored mix.
